reviews.review_description:
I've been playing this for over a year now, mostly custom songs on master wild spiral, it's great for burning calories and a lot of fun. People saying it's a cash grab need to learn how to install custom songs lol, there's literally THOUSANDS of them.

Anyways, they JUST released a new update which added profile levels, challenges, etc, which is kinda cool and shows the dev is still working on the game a little bit. But seriously? We STILL can't add songs to Favorites on the post song screen? Really?!! What. The. Fudge? So if we have the filter set to least played, then we play something new that was awesome, guess what, it disappears completely to somewhere down the list and you might have to scroll through hundreds of songs to find it, or slowly type it into search if you even saw the title of the song. And also we STILL can't add/remove favorites from custom playlists. This ---- is basic rythm game menu stuff. So, minus 1 star for not having done that simple stuff yet.

reviews.review_title: Experiences is Where the Fun is!
reviews.review_description: I’ve played all the albums, that are free, and I’ve purchased all the Experience DLCs. There is no doubt that the Experiences is where the fun is. I don’t mind paying a few dollars for VR/MR fly-throughs. They are amazing! But I’m not going to invest in music I don’t like. I know you are trying to hit the mainstream audience, but this is “Synth Riders.” Please only release EDM or Synthwave music. It’s an amazing genre and it sticks to the name.

reviews.review_title: The GOLD STANDARD of Rhythm Games ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
reviews.review_description: Synthiders is a such blast to play. Invigorating & tons of fun. When I first purchased a Quest seven years ago SR was one of the first apps I bought & I had it in heavy rotation for years because of the great tunes & gameplay. When I finally danced my way to expert & master levels is when I truly fell in love with Synthriders. Now 500+ apps later SR is the only app I continue to play everyday. The sound, visuals, haptic feedback & choreography are top-tier. The "Experiences" are mind-blowing & the 80s, 90s & Swing music packs are fantastic - ditto for Lindsey Stirling, Gorillaz, League Of Legends, Kendrick Lamar, Muse, Sia (and many more) & now the LVDY GAGA pack which I can't stop dancing to. If you want to get in great shape while having a blast, buy this rhythm game. It's obvious a lot of love & passion went into this app. Thank you Abraham Aguero, Jhean Ceballos, & the rest of the team at Kluge for this awesome game🙏
I love this game better than beat saber. It's an adrenaline workout you don't know you're having.
Stupid game is filled with inappropriate music one star beat saber did better than this game do better next time

I had 4 back surgeries when I was 30 I am 54 now and now have neck problems. I play vr to keep me motivated and mobile but most of all I have to tell you this game has given me so much more then exercise it gives me a reason to get up and moving every single day and not sitting! It’s WELL WORTH EVERY DOLLAR I’ll gladly pay for what they have given me in return,I even got my PTherapist into it,I do wish for more 80’s and below songs m exhausted with synth( I know the irony ha) love you all

I purchased SynthRiders after have had a Horizon+ expire a while ago. 

Won’t launch. I’ve tried forcing reinstall. 

I just received the new MetaOS UI before my purchase.

developer_response.body: Please try uninstalling the game, rebooting your headset and then reinstalling the game.  This can sometimes clear stuck installs which are partially downloaded from Meta.  If this doesn't resolve the situation for you, please get in touch - contact@synthridersvr.com, we'd like to help get you playing again!

reviews.review_description:
I really love this game! It's something you can just pick up, throw on a song and get energised to! There's a decent amount of varied songs in the main catalogue and then a whole load of DLC. But I even find the base game enough. It's intuitive, and good for everyone. My relatives and friends stop by and say that this is one of their favourite games straight away.
The scenery is really cool and performance is great!
My favourite song is "On My Way"! That jawn really helps to heal my depression for a bit!
Everyone should have this game in rotation!

reviews.review_title: Really fun app but such a money grab
reviews.review_description: I really love the concept of this app and I have tons of fun playing it but the amount of money they charge just to play anything that isn’t the awful base songs they offer is insane. It’s already stupid expensive for the game itself, the platform (VR headset) and now they want more money just for 1 extra song?!? Such a rip off.

developer_response.body:
Hi there!

We really do try to price packs as competitively as possible for what goes into them. Each song isn’t just “dropped in”. There's quite a lot that goes into them, more than perhaps is evident on the surface. We're talking mapping, difficulty tweaking, testing, polish, platform fees, and yes, music licensing, which is… a whole other beast.

That said, we’re very aware not everyone wants to keep spending, which is why we also regularly add free tracks, including community-voted songs, so the game keeps growing even if you never buy DLC.

You’re absolutely entitled to decide what’s worth it for you, and we appreciate you giving the game a shot in the first place. Even critical feedback like this helps us push for better balance long-term.

reviews.review_title: Gets me moving at home a little bit
reviews.review_description:
If like me home working has left you with reduced mobility and you need to get moving a bit more this is a good game/app. Though it won't replace high intensity level cardio like playing football or leaving the house for a very long walk on different terrains it does help and I'm starting to feel less restricted.

In Synth Riders you basically use your hands to hit shapes and colours in sync with 2-3 minute long music tracks. The game then grades your combos and success rate against a leaderboard, so you can track progress.

I work from home 9 days out of 10 and weight train four days a week very heavy... deadlifts, squats and presses etc. A lack of moving around during the day and doing heavy weight training was starting to impact me a little bit in terms of being stiff, feeling sore and being unable to have full range of motion. I could go out during the weekends but Monday to Friday I was spending 5 or more hours in a chair each day. This has been a great help! 

Doing 60-180 minutes (20+ mins a day) a week on Synth Riders using the higher two difficulty settings has helped loosen me up a lot. Its a very good level of low impact cardio if you select higher BPM songs. 

The game itself works well both in VR and the mixed reality feature and no failure mode means my young kids can join in too. There's a great selection of electronic dance songs and other genres or you can pay a few pounds and get tracks from artists like Muse, Lady Gaga, Gorillaz, Queen and more including 80s classics! 

Outside of an actual fitness app this is the best app I've found that's engaging and gets me moving a little bit. Again it won't replace a game of football or something that makes you bust a gut but it'll help if you sit a lot in a chair working.

This game isn't going to magically heal a back or neck problem but its going to help as a tool in your kit to get you on your feet.

I hope more modes and songs get added!

reviews.review_title: Great exercise in a lot of fun but..
reviews.review_description:
Really enjoying this app. It's great exercise and I've met a few people. I've also purchased some DLC content. Looking at some of the reviews on here I don't think a lot of people know that you can side load songs from synth riderz website which is quite easy and great. 

The only thing I wish is when you're in the game and you're playing these custom songs if there's one you don't lie why can't you delete it from the console???
I find this game right up my ally. I love synth music and more.. I find this better than the other rhythm games out there, and the music variety and selection is huge.
Syinth riders is an excellent game to play i love it worh all the different songs and backgrounds I think eventually k pop huntrix song should come on here I would love tp move to l pop

I absolutely love this game. It's literally the only thing I use my VR for. I don't even mind buying the songs or song packs,because you can tell the work that goes into each one! I do favor the original pieces in the game though. They are more fun than the mainstream songs,with better beats and better lyrics. I would like to see some Paula Abdul ones though. 😁😉

This is the fitness app I keep coming back to.   There’s something for everyone.  This app has a good variety of different tunes and an adequate number of workouts.   You get more for your money with this app.  And sometimes they will still add in a new song for free in a major update which I appreciate.

Most of these arcade style apps just have moving incoming targets and rails, but what sets SynthRider apart from the others is the moving floor/stage.  It makes it feel more dynamic and interesting.  It’s not a dancing app yet it does make one feel almost like they are dancing.  The choreography is also especially good for some of the DLC's that you can buy.   
There are some adjustments that can be made to make this game adaptable for just about anyone.

It’s fun to play SynthRider with someone else.   It feels like a shared experience.   I enjoy playing against my husband in multiplayer.

The one thing they need to work on is the *avatars…which at present we have lost in the multiplayer mode because of meta.   Hopefully SynthRider figures that all out soon, because having avatars does make multiplayer more fun.   Please make realistic looking options for us.

I played random song with random stage.
in 7 songs, the same stage 4 times!
 
It’s very boring! 
Last 567songs continually the same stage!
Why?

developer_response.body:
We're unable to replicate the issue you're reporting and would like to provide you with a little more context on how Random Stage works which may explain what you are seeing, particularly if you are playing with modifiers!

* A new random selection is made when you choose to Play a song, or choose Random Song at the end of playing a song.
* Each time this is a pure random choice, with every stage given equal chance of selection, rather than a shuffle which would exhaust the list of stages before cycling again.
* The stage does not change on song restart, nor does it change when you are playing a playlist in non-stop mode.  This is to reduce the transition time between songs to meet the needs of fitness players who don't want to cool down.
* While there are 17 stages available in Linear Mode, there are only 3 stages compatible with Spin Mode and 1 for Spiral Mode, using those modifiers will naturally result in less randomization.

We hope that we've been able to solve the issue for you and that you'll consider updating your review - and if not, we'd love to help here but it's hard to do that via a review page.  Please get in touch with us directly at synthridersvr.com/contact

reviews.review_title: The best dance game for VR, period
reviews.review_description: Title says it all. This game started out as a neat little fitness game for synthwave fans, but it turned out to be something much bigger. They added experiences that'll blow your mind with their visuals, and new bundles keep popping up to this day. I see others mentioned that in-game purchases don't work - no idea about that, never tried that, I bought all the add-ons on the web, in the Quest store, and they all worked, so I guess you should use the Quest web store or mobile app for purchases? Anyway, if the add-ons aren't enough, there are THOUSANDS of custom songs made by the community, and even custom stages! The beatmap editor is FREE, so you can even make your own songs (I already made one!). This means literally infinite content. What other game gives you this level of freedom? NONE. I already got this game on PSVR2 and Steam, and now on the Quest, too. It's an absolute must have in any library. If you want the best dance game for VR, look no further, you've found it. It's not even a contest. Yours truly, an avid fan.

reviews.review_title: Crashes all the Time since last Update.
reviews.review_description:
Unfortunately, ever since the last update, it's been nothing but crashes and problems! It really sucks!
I'm really pissed off!

developer_response.body:
We hope that the patches released since your review have  resolved the issues for you that you were experiencing.  If not we really do want to help you get back to playing again, but it's very difficult to provide comprehensive assistance here in your review.  

Please get in touch with us *directly* - visit us at synthridersvr.com/contact for all the links to us on Discord, Facebook, Email & Reddit.  We're here to help!

reviews.review_title: Such an amazing change from beat saber!
reviews.review_description: Played alot of beat saber on psvr then finally got a meta quest and had a shot of this and what alot of fun this is! Definitely buying all the music packs because I already know for a fact I will be playing this for a time! And they've added in Lindsey Stirling songs, yes please!

Awesome game. But I purchased extra songs and the game keep forgetting that I did. When I wanna just grab the Quest for a quick game I can never be sure that the extra songs purchased will work or not.

I'm so mad for this horrible in-app purchase management that relays on costant on-line activation THAT CANNOT BE TRUSTED

I hate it and It also makes me think the day they stop supporting the online game I will loose every purchase I did, for an offline, single player game

Do not buy extra songs until they change the way it works. Sorry.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for the kind words about the game, and honestly, we get why this is infuriating. You’re not wrong to expect a single-player session to “just work” when you put the headset on.

What’s tripping things up here isn’t the game forgetting your purchases, but how Meta handles DLC entitlements. Extra songs require a quick online check with Meta’s backend to confirm ownership. If that check fails (usually because of connectivity issues or account mismatches), the DLC can temporarily appear unavailable. That system is entirely on Meta’s side, and unfortunately not something we can change or override.

That said, the frustration around reliability is totally valid, and we’re always feeding this feedback upstream. In the meantime, making sure you’re logged into the purchasing account and have a stable connection before jumping in usually avoids the issue. If it keeps happening, our Discord or support page is the quickest way for us to help troubleshoot.

reviews.review_description: I love this game, my spouse love it, my kids love it. It gets you moving. But please add more tracks.  Add more dlc and take my money.

This is the best app for me for exercise. I hate gyms. Now I can just pick up my headset, punch in one of my song lists and work out as hard or as easy as I wish. I always get to close all my rings on apple watch. I know quite a few folks my age who love this too by FB feeds. Thanks for making such a great app that is good for all age groups.

Love it all
Perfect songs to dance to. I love that you don’t have to hit/punch the marks. I sweat every time. Hours fly by playing this gamercise.

This game has become my turn-to game on quest. They have a great gameplay and a caring development team and a strong discourse team. There are weekly events and of course other events with really nice people involved  there is a dedicated representative on Facebook who literally answers everything and makes sure all bugs and issues are solved. The gameplay is thrilling and the experiences are overwhelming. Definitely worth the investment paid!  The fact that’s it’s so easy to deal with custom maps is also very nice. The multiplayer mode that allows you (in quest) to see each others avatars and talk to each other is a great feature as well. 
I don’t know whether to classify this as a rhythm game or an exercise game or a coordination game because it’s all of them. If you put the game in certain modes (there are a plethora of modes) you can get a heck of a cardio and coordination workout. I usually finish dripping wet and exhausted! 
The songs are great. I never thought I’d be into swing but in this game it’s just a perfect fit. The game has the way to bring and song to the next level. 
I’d give this game  more than 5 stars if I could. There’s just something warming and healthy about the whole game and it’s developers.  It’s a game people love to play and it’s popularity is just improving over time. 
The one really difficult thing is the scoring because to really get up there the requirements are tough. 
But the fun that is involved makes it such a pleasure that the competitive aspect really has no effect on the enjoyment. Sometimes I concentrate on improving scores and I come out of it getting a different feeling from the game that I didn’t get before. So this game is not boring or draggy. There are so many things to do and ways to play that there’s never a dull moment.

I love this game so much, I only wish there was harder difficulties and more songs like "shatter me" that actually feels good to dance and move too!

 I saw another comment saying buying extra songs was an issue for them, but it has never been that for me ever.  Shatter me(Lindsay Stirling) is the one I play the most.. It feels the smoothest, I can't explain it! But I love walls, squatting and turning around in wild spin, it's really fun and I need more songs like that, fast paste but with the beat of the song..
it won't let me play please fix it its making me so mad i just. i don't understand virtual reality systems are freakishly expensive in their games are not working fix it please

developer_response.body:
We hope you've been able to get the game installed again now - sometimes your headset might have a problem downloading your game save or an update from Meta correctly and needs some help.  We'd love to give you that help - but we just can't do support properly via our reviews page!

Please get in touch with us *directly* - visit us at synthridersvr.com/contact for all our links to Discord, Facebook & Reddit and we'll get you back riding those rails again.

reviews.review_description: $24.99 just to play and then the music sucks unless you buy some. I spent $2.00 for a set of 80s tunes and after one song it wanted me to buy the set again so I only got one song. And when I was buying the song the screen to put in your pin wouldn’tstay out so I got really dizzy. I didn’t really like playing and wish I had my money back. I won’t do this again.

it IS a fun game.  Worth grabbing the base game in a sale and having a play.  

BUT, and it's a big but, as others have mentioned, I do not recommend purchasing any DLC.  It's frequently unavailable, due to *reasons*.  :/

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thanks for the review, I can see why you'd be frustrated.

To add a bit of context here: DLC access is handled by Meta’s entitlement system, which does a quick check with their backend to confirm purchases. If that check fails (usually due to connectivity hiccups or being logged into a different Meta account), DLC can temporarily appear unavailable. Unfortunately, that part is out of our hands.

If this happens, double-check you’re on the account that made the purchase and that your headset has a stable internet connection. If it’s still acting up, our Discord and support page are the fastest way to get eyes on it and help you sort things out.

Appreciate you calling it out, and thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: Great App, lots of fun, good music and nicely choreographed maps. Love it, good to get into the flow…

This is crashing on my Quest 2.  Tried reloading.  Still having same problems.  All other games/apps working flawlessly.   Anybody else having issue?

Same issue on Quest 3S.  Unplayable.   My only guess is a corrupt save file.  Deleted and reloaded multiple times.

Update 1/20 - Deleted old game file and now working great.  Thanks for the developers for reach out.
Was my fav game but can no longer play???!! why?!

developer_response.body:
We hope that you've been able to get back playing again - sometimes your headset might have a problem downloading your game save or an update from Meta correctly and needs a little help to get you going again.

We'd love to give you that help - but we just can't do support properly via our reviews page! Please get in touch with us *directly* - visit us at synthridersvr.com/contact and we'll get you back riding those rails again.

reviews.review_description: game ever
good virtual reality fitness app too! could be its own focused extra side mode FINAL FURY mixture thing maybe?

I am a big fan of Muse and man what a treat. Unreal!
Please come up with more experiences!

It’s a fun way to do some cardio, and there’s some ok music included with the base game, but I feel like I spend more time than necessary trying to find a song I actually like, and usually end up just playing one at random to not waste time with the UI.

I know you want to sell DLC but I’d prefer if there was an easier list of available songs without getting DLC shoved in my face. I also see too many people complain they buy DLC and don’t receive the content that I don’t even know if I want to pay more just to risk it anyway 🤔

Good game, though.
It's a fun game..just wish there was a setting for people with acrophobia..my legs get pretty noodly sometimes and it is difficult to focus on the task.
Love it. Making custom Playlist is a nightmare though. So tedious. Should be an easy fix to make it a more streamline process but they refuse.

This is one of my favourite things to play on my meta quest. I love the way it makes you dance just by playing, it is so much fun and gives me a brilliant work out. There are loads of music tracks on it, however, I am desperate for more music packs (and not just one or two tracks) that are actually hit pop songs. I enjoyed the 80’s, 90’s hit packs and the Gorillaz, but there is just not enough pop hits or even rock. There is a lot of trance and “German” type heavy metal style tracks which are impossible or just not enjoyable to “dance” to. As I haven’t got a PC it is impossible for me to download custom songs too. Also, there is a massive jump in difficulty between normal and hard to advanced. Again,impossible for me being in my 50’s and with chronic conditions that limit my mobility. Please give us more mainstream music at beginner and normal mode to enjoy, and more music pack updates as they don’t happen often enough.

reviews.review_title: Do not buy add-ons. Don't work.
reviews.review_description: Bought a music pack addon. The game didn't recognize I bought it. Tried everything to troubleshoot. Contacted the developer with no answer. Almost 5 dollars wasted.

I tried purchasing a song and it kept saying trouble with purchase. It ended up charging me 8 times and still didn’t get the song. Rip off game. Some good songs but most are crap I don’t know and don’t enjoy doing

developer_response.body:
We're very sorry to hear that you've had a terrible time trying to purchase DLC from the store!

When you select the option to buy a song from the game, you are taken to Meta's shopfront in order to complete the transaction, and that's where the transactions are completed.  So unfortunately this means we don't hold any payment details or information to be able to assist you directly to remedy any incorrect charges!

In order to receive a refund if you have been charged incorrectly, please reach out to Meta Support and they should be able to assist you promptly.  If you don't receive a prompt or satisfactory response, please get in touch and we'll do what we can from our side to help you get a resolution - you can contact us for help directly at contact@synthridersvr.com or via the form on our website.

reviews.review_description: The gameplay is great, and the devs have gone out of their way to get a fun variety of songs. I had not expected to see Infected Mushroom in a game.

I love the music options! I’m new to vr and I tried beat saber and some others but officially stuck with synth riders for the music. I love the challenges.. it doesn’t make me sick, andddd I’m losing weight!

reviews.review_title: More of a fitness game, less of rhythm.
reviews.review_description: This seems fine as a fitness game, but is abyssmal as a rhythm game, the judgement system for the "Rhythm" game mode seems VERY arbitrary, there's nothing to judge rhythm on anyway, why not just drop that mode and have it only be Force? They seem exactly the same but one has a worse judgement system, but I have no idea how it works anyways, I skipped the tutorial so maybe they go more in-depth on what gives you a Poor and what gives you a Perfect. Other than that I'd say I find the gameplay really enjoyable, I really only bothered to play one song again and again (Never Gonna Die by Pennywise) and found the charting really fun, which I think I can sort of attribute to me playing maimai, which leads me to my closing statement. If you want a real rhythm game, find a Round 1 and play maimai, all of them have one.

I’ve been using this game to get some basic movement and exercise. Still learning and almost exclusively on “easy” mode. I will admit that at 65, a lot of the included music isn’t something I know (where’s my 70’s Gold?). However, I’ve found some I like and don’t mind playing on repeat. I get bored with exercise and usually just quit, but this game makes it fun and I find my “scheduled” time running out before I’m ready to stop.

It's a solid game. MR in particular feels good. 

But game needs more polish: 
Mapping in some songs is bad (feels random/AI generated). 
Menu in MR is sometimes cut. (can't select all options).
Some environments look poor.
Colors are wrong (red is left, green is right). No it is not invented by Beatsaber the convention is hundreds of years old (for example used by  planes and boots).
Had to legit buy everything if you want to jam out to some good songs
Love the game but seriously need more music options.
I really enjoy the game, and I think Jamiroquai, Prodigy and Arctic Monkeys songs would be great in this 🤩 Just a suggestion, I would love to see more music choices like that

reviews.review_title: Music Options I’ll buy any below
reviews.review_description: Rhianna, Bruno Mars, Jason Derulo, The Weeknd, Justin Bieber or Timberlake, Britney Spears, Taylor Swift, Maroon5, Marshmello, NF, Bazzi, Ed Sheeran, OneRepublic, Drake, Kendrick Lamar not just HUMBLE., Khelani, Jessie Reyes, Khalid, Lecrae, Shania Twain, Reba, Cameron J, Destiny’s Child, The Dream, Nicki Minaj, Meg the Stallion, Chris Brown, T-Pain, Akon I’ll take Backstreet Boys at this point. As you can tell I don’t discriminate when it comes to the music I listen to. I just want some known and good music.

I like this game and I have used it for workouts in the past, but my biggest complaint would be the music selection. I don't know half of the people on those playlists. We need more Hip Hop and pop and dancehall music. I only seen one hip-hop song on there by Kendrick Lamar. Kendrick Lamar should have had his own playlist on there with more than just humble. What about they not like us? That was the number one song this year, and he performed it at the Super Bowl. So I would absolutely love to use this game on my everyday workout if they could get more variety with the music and also make it where we can add our own music from our own playlist because when I work out I have a playlist set up from YouTube playing in the background while I'm using other workout apps on my VR. Just some suggestions. Otherwise it is an amazing app and it will make you lose weight if you use it consistently.

I had made a review, made recommendations, and had a developer response. I said my favorite song was Booty Swing and Lone Digger. Probably recommended Infected mushroom too. Why can't I find my review?

So yeah like most people I bought Bear Saber and had fun with it, but picked up Synth Riders on a whim and have been having a great time with this one.  

Very easy to upload custom tracks to  the headset, and the gameplay itself is very fluid, fun and satisfying.

Taking it on holiday with me!
Can’t seem to not think about this game. Its a regular scheduled activity. Lost a few pounds too.
One of the only VR games I keep coming back to. So ridiculously addicting -- intuitive gameplay, killer soundtrack, and great devs.
I havevbeen playing this game for two years and its suddenly stopped working despite me uninstalling and restalling it agsin its unplable

developer_response.body: Please go into your Meta Account and roll back to a previous save game where it was working - your save data may be corrupt.  Please see: https://www.meta.com/en-gb/help/quest/399621398228171/ for details on how to do this

reviews.review_description: Как раз то, что нужно для того, чтобы 10 минут растрясти жирок между унылыми задачами. Для любителей стнтвейва мастхэв, и повеселее, чем рубить кубики.
I love the game and recommend it to everyone, just bummed out about not having Bhaptics vest support anymore.

developer_response.body: bHaptics is definitely back - you just need to enable it in the game settings.  We hope you'll be back feeling the good vibes again soon!

reviews.review_title: I love this Game im Hooked
reviews.review_description: It's amazing, like Guitar Hero, but you're using your hands! The add-ons for songs are really reasonably priced. If you enjoy Guitar Hero, you'll absolutely love this! for the meta just want to know if the person that makes this take request for songs as wont be play my guitar hero no more this has taken over it so much fun
Love this game!

honestly i love this game but it desperately need something like a campaign to give incentive to play through all of the songs i think it would add replay value and definitely would make me more interested in purchasing dlc

Great beatsaber alternative for Synth enthusiasts. The library of music is slowly increasing and features a mix of synthwave, synth pop, darksynth, 80s, 90s, and more. Don't overlook this great title. With leaderboards, difficulty options, and alternate modes, as well as "experiences", it is a fantastic rhythm game. And good for working out 💯😀
I really enjoy this game. It helps me burn calories at the same time. I just wish it wasn't so difficult to add more songs.
I love this app. Very good for movement and workouts. Would love more music options though. Most of the music is only 70s/80s would love some more 90s and 2000s options..

It's been more than a year you released AVP with hand tracking support for AVP but not for Quest 3

I cannot play this game knowing that it exist with hand tracking already but not here.
My favorite VR game, so fun.

I wasn't sure about this game at first since it looked like a knockoff beat saber, but I ended up liking it way more for a few different reasons. Beat Saber is in no way a bad game and I still like it, but I prefer Synth Riders 

First of all, I can turn down or turn off the sound effect of my controller hitting the notes which is something beat saber doesn't have. I don't want these weird sounds being made when I'm trying to hear the song. 

Second, I think Synth Riders has better songs (preference) but also better variety in my opinion. Having not purchased any dlc I am very happy with the amount and variety of songs included in the game.

Aside from being very fun, this game has been in my rotation of active games that I use to get some exercise and usually work up a good sweat.

I would definitely recommend this game to anyone who likes rhythm games and/or is looking for an active game that makes moving around fun

reviews.review_title: One of the BEST Rhythm Games!
reviews.review_description:
I’ve been addicted to this game for a few months now and using it for a work out. Time flys by and I just want to keep playing. 
The modding scene is easy to set up and gives the game longevity. Plus the multiplayer is fun. 

Highly recommend, even if you don’t care for this kind of game.

reviews.review_title: I am so happy with this title!
reviews.review_description: For someone who enjoys music and dancing, this title is a blast to play! It offers mixed reality mode as well as vr mode and is a beauty! Great sound and graphics, I couldn't live without it! Recommended.

reviews.review_title: Didn't think I would like it .
reviews.review_description: Didn't think I would like this game. Man, was I wrong? I’m 62 years old, and I can’t get enough. So much fun with the mindset of  I can do better.  I just need a cooldown song.
Love the game, too bad i don`t have enough time to play it. I would recommend it for those who work at home, removes the stiffness and makes you question all those back aches from 8+ hours of work!
Such a fun app and the fact that it gets me working up a sweat is a bonus.

reviews.review_title: Easy tutorial! Grips you rights away!
reviews.review_description: Fun and fast paced, this game brings joy and energy to your workout experience!

Good concept but only 1 song that I actually find playable. Why not add more hardcore, industrial, power electronics or otherwise more intense rhythm songs so one can have a good workout where punching actually makes sense? Or at least some danceable bangers from the 80s and 90s that will never go out of style?

developer_response.body:
Hi Mousellina!

Hopefully the two 80s packs have gone some way to scratching that itch for music that will never go out of style!

We are at heart a dancing game rather than a punching game - although in Force Mode you can swipe through the notes to increase the level of physical activity if you want more of a workout.  Also consider upping your Play Area Scale under Settings > Calibration which will space those targets out and make you work harder to get to them.

reviews.review_description: my back and my rem is not good

I've been playing this game on and off for a few years now, and I find it to be a great exercise and stress busting activity (I find that just concentrating on the orbs helps me escape the daily stress for a bit)

I'm now 53, I'm in the decade of mystery pains, and I think that playing this game (albeit at lower intensity) is helping me to remain healthy.  It's a game that I am very glad that I found. Try it, it may help you as well!
Truly great! My favorite app by far. The experiences are mindblowing.

I LOVE this game. First, the variety of music is much better than other rhythm games out there. Also, there is a wider variety of backgrounds and themes. Second, this game actually makes me feel like I am dancing, unlike other games.  It is a full body workout and so much fun.  There was one selection I played where I felt like I was actually conducting the experience. 

There is often a comparison to another very popular rhythm game (you know what I mean!), and I'd have to say they are very different experiences.  They each have their pros and cons, but I wouldn't say it's a one or the other thing. I play both and enjoy both at different times. Overall though, I think I prefer this game because I find I can play for a longer time because of the wider variety available, and I personally enjoy the feeling that I'm actually dancing.

reviews.review_title: Game makes me motion sick. What changed?
reviews.review_description:
This game used to be one of my favorites. I'd play it multiple times a week (with friends) and LOVED it.  Recently, however, I've been struggling with it. Something changed last time I updated the game and/or headset, and now it makes me motion sick. 

For some reason, the orbs appear to be slightly out of focus until they're RIGHT in front of your face (which doesn't make sense because you need to track what's coming to be able to play),  and the background is more in focus than anything else (which causes the eye to go to/focus on that instead of the targets). Even the  menus seem slightly out of focus.  

Whether it is the focus or something else that is different,  it's made it so that i can no longer get through an entire song without getting nauseous. I thought it might be just me and my headset, but when my friends and I met up to play, they had the same problem and we all gave up after a couple of songs--we usually play together for an hour or two at a time (I still play other rhythm dance games ok).

I'm really disappointed because for more than 2 years, it's been one of my favorites. 

Please consider fixing the focus issues and/or doing an update that reduces the motion sickness potential. Thanks

developer_response.body:
Hi ElleVr,

Can you tell us whether this is still a concern for you?  We believe that this issue has been addressed, and if it's not working for you we'd love to help you have a better experience playing and understand what's happening in your case.

You can reach us at synthridersvr.com/contact-us

reviews.review_title: Wants me to accept an EULA
reviews.review_description: So instead I didn't.

How is Synth Riders not getting more hype over Beat Saber??
Synth Riders is a much more enjoyable experience, and has a much wider variety of music. You can really feel that there is a connection between gameplay actions and the music playing. 
PLEASE bring out a Metallica DLC pack!
